message:
fix: saturating uptime_ms cast in WhatsApp and add SSE max_data_bytes limit

WhatsApp: replace truncating as-u64 cast on uptime_ms with
try_from().unwrap_or(u64::MAX) to prevent overflow on long-running
connectors.

fcp-streaming/sse: add max_data_bytes field to SseParser with
configurable retained payload limit (default 10MB in tests). Replace
Default derive with explicit with_max_data_bytes constructor. This
prevents DoS from SSE streams that accumulate unbounded data: lines
without producing a complete event.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
